course_subtitle: From Band 4 Accuracy to Band 9 Sophistication
pedagogical_note: Three modules ordered by the Grammatical Range & Accuracy rubric. Topic 22 (Common Errors) is a cross-cutting bug-report surfaced inside every topic's 'common_errors' block.

modules.title: The Accuracy Foundation
modules.focus: Eliminate fossilized errors. Zero-tolerance for basic mistakes.

modules.title: The Complexity Bridge
modules.focus: Transition from simple sentences to complex, connected structures.

modules.title: The Academic Sophistication
modules.focus: Professionalism, nuance, Academic Charisma. The 'secret sauce' for high bands.

cross_cutting.title: Common Errors — The Bug Report
cross_cutting.note: Pre-submission checklist surfaced alongside every module.
